title: Live provider smoke learning loop
description: A small live-provider path that proves provider response, capsule creation, extraction attempt, and guarded reporting without brittle exact text assertions.
user_goal: In one sentence, acknowledge this Kestrel learning eval and avoid secrets.

candidate_procedures: When live provider behavior is nondeterministic, mark exact wording as nondeterministic and evaluate structural learning-loop signals instead of brittle text exactness.
reusable_lessons: Live provider smoke output is nondeterministic by design.
